sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112152" key="fortagwge/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φορτᾰγωγ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n112152.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">carry loads</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">burdens,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Longin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">43.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
